---
listing:
  - id: index-blog
    contents:
      - "blog/*/*.qmd"
      - "blog/*/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 9
    page-size: 3
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [title, image, description, date]
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  body-width: 1500px
  margin-width: 0px
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {

  const listingId = "listing-index-blog";

  function fixLinks() {
    document.querySelectorAll("#" + listingId + " .listing-pagination a.page-link[href='#']").forEach(function(link) {
      const pageNum = link.getAttribute("data-i");
      if (pageNum) {
        link.href = "#" + listingId;
      }
    });
  }

  setTimeout(fixLinks, 100);

  const observer = new MutationObserver(function() {
    setTimeout(fixLinks, 10);
  });

  const pagination = document.querySelector("#" + listingId + " .listing-pagination");
  if (pagination) {
    observer.observe(pagination, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }

});
</script>
```

```{r}
glue_qmd <- \(x, .envir = parent.frame()) {

  stringr::str_glue(x, .open = "<<", .close = ">>", .envir = .envir)

}

social_icon <- \(id, icon, set = "fa6-brands") {

  glue_qmd("
    <a
      href='{{< var links.<<id>>.href >}}'
      title=<<id>>
      target='_blank'
      rel='noopener'>
      <iconify-icon
        icon='<<set>>:<<icon>>'
        width='1.5em'
        height='1.5em'>
      </iconify-icon>
    </a>
  ")

}
```

::: {.index-logo .column-screen}
```{=html}
<div class="index-logo-libelle">
  <img src="_img/word-homepage.png" alt="Libellé ALISP">
</div>
<div class="index-logo-lille">
  <img src="_img/sym-red-nobg.png" alt="Logo ville de Lille">
</div>
<div class="index-logo-alisp-social">
  <div class="index-logo-alisp">
    <img src="_img/logo-homepage.png" alt="Logo ALISP">
  </div>
  <div class="index-logo-social">
    `r social_icon(id = "mail", icon = "envelope", set = "fa")`
    `r social_icon(id = "insta", icon = "instagram")`
    `r social_icon(id = "twitter", icon = "x-twitter")`
    `r social_icon(id = "facebook", icon = "facebook")`
    `r social_icon(id = "linkedin", icon = "linkedin")`
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column-screen style="text-align: center;"}
![](_img/lille_cut.png)
:::

\

# [**Actualités**](/blog)

::: {#index-blog}
:::
